goal: Two related team-spawn fixes: (1) gad team start --projectid global from monorepo cwd silently kills the detached worker — phantom pid returned, NOT_STARTED state, status.json never written. Workaround proven: --no-spawn + manual node bin/gad.cjs team work background launch. Instrument lib/team/spawn.cjs::spawnWorker with eager error logging. Try windowsVerbatimArguments + argv0. Fall back to non-detached spawn with cmd start /B wrapper on Windows. (2) When runtime=codex-cli auto-inject headless flags into runtime_cmd: '-c features.codex_hooks=false -c notify=[]'. Without these OMX notify-hook hangs codex in detached worker (zero output for 20+ min). See ERRORS codex-hooks-hang-detached-worker-2026-04-22.
